debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun i ω => i ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by
  have h_meas : ∀ i, Measurable (fun s : Set ι ↦ i ∈ s) := fun i ↦
    (measurable_pi_apply i).comp MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable
  rw [← iIndepFun_map_iff h_meas hX.aemeasurable, hX.map_eq, bernoulliOn_eq_map,
    ← iIndepFun_map_iff h_meas MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable.aemeasurable]
  exact iIndepFun_infinitePi _

  rw [iIndepFun_iff]
  rintro S f -
  rw [← hX.map_apply]
  · rw [bernoulliOn_apply']
    convert Measure.infinitePi_pi S (fun _ _ ↦ trivial)
    · ext; simp [Set.mem_pi]
    · simp_rw [← hX.map_apply (by fun_prop), bernoulliOn_apply']
      congr with i
      convert Measure.infinitePi_pi {i} (fun _ _ ↦ trivial) using 1
      · ext; simp
      · simp
  · exact MeasurableSet.iInter fun i ↦ .iInter fun _ ↦ by fun_prop

by
  rw [iIndepFun_iff]
  intro t s hs
  let μ : ∀ i, Measure Prop := fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False
  have hμ : ∀ i, IsProbabilityMeasure (μ i) := fun i ↦ by
    constructor
    simp only [Measure.add_apply, Measure.smul_apply, Measure.dirac_apply', Set.mem_univ,
      if_true, smul_eq_mul, mul_one]
    rw [← ENNReal.coe_add]
    congr
    simp
  letI := hμ
  have key : map (fun ω i ↦ i ∈ X ω) P = infinitePi μ := by
    rw [← hX.map_eq, bernoulliOn_eq_map, Measure.map_map]
    · simp
    · exact MeasurableEquiv.setOf.measurable
    · exact MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable
  rw [← map_apply (by fun_prop) (MeasurableSet.pi t.countable_toSet hs), key,
    Measure.infinitePi_pi _ hs]
  refine Finset.prod_congr rfl fun i hi ↦ ?_
  rw [← map_apply (by fun_prop) (hs i), key]
  convert Measure.infinitePi_pi {i} (fun j _ ↦ if j = i then s i else Set.univ)
  · ext f; simp
  · intro j
    split_ifs
    · exact hs i
    · exact MeasurableSet.univ
  · simp
